case_title: UTMAN, CELIA ROSE VS TRIKON MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-02-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF UTMAN, CELIA ROSE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRIKON MANAGEMENT, INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,134.00, THE COURT AWARDS THE MAXIMUM ALLOWED PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE SECTION 1859. THE COURT AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO CORRECTLY NAME THE DEFENDANT TRIKON MANAGEMENT, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
